_comment: Example LBO inputs reproducing the DemoDeal template's current state. Use as a sanity-test fixture, OR as a starting point for a real deal — copy this file, rename, update values, run `engine run lbo --inputs <file> --deal <Deal>`.
_units: EBITDA in £m. Multiples are 0.0x literal. Rates / fractions are decimals (0.25 = 25%). Dates are ISO YYYY-MM-DD.
